title: Shared execution root: semantic memory integration
description: Non-runnable feature container for the semantic memory rollout. All implementation, verification, documentation, and review work is carried by child beads under this feature root.
acceptance_criteria: The child bead graph covers memory backend, CLI, runner injection, planning ingestion, onboarding/bootstrap, and guardrail/skill updates required by the spec.
Implementation work is split into focused developer beads with explicit ordering where files or subsystems overlap.
Shared tester, documentation, and review follow-up beads depend on the full implementation set they validate.
